subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1913-05-01
subcodes.first_line: The darkness of materialism has enveloped Europe. Natural civilization has advanced tremendously and progress is magical and by leaps and bounds
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع اهل غرب غرق ظلمات طبیعتند انوار الهیه غروب نموده هر چند در جسمانیات بمنتهی درجهٴ
subcodes.subjects: @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization, @growth of the Cause, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
